title: Console Advancement Sounds
body:
![Toast displaying Advancement Made! Console Advancement Sounds on a blurred background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v2x7Gozv/images/c6ff97fe8cec7371a3984c3bd5a0389f3a880f40.png) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/console-advancement-sounds) [](https://github.com/Nostalgia-Reverie/Console-Advancement-Sounds) [](https://discord.gg/ckGmfKRyCr) [](https://fabricmc.net/) [](https://www.ko-fi.com/Jab125)

![Information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e25570e1d156c711baad158a5565061b157a94e9.webp) This mod adds new sounds based on and almost identical to the sounds found on consoles like PlayStation 4, Xbox One, and Steam, and bonus special sounds for Xbox One and PlayStation 5!

Nostalgica Reverie discord

The Nostalgica Reverie discord is the best place for nostalgia-based projects like Re-Console, Nostalgic Tweaks, Moderner Beta, and more! Here you can discuss anything related to our organizations projects, interact with the community or talk about programming!
Click here to join!

![Special Thanks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42bdd0b7ac744fbb277bcb8aea88598b682b9c07.webp) - [Jab125](https://modrinth.com/user/Jab125) for Console Advancement Sounds's code - [NicSonic](https://modrinth.com/user/NicSonic) for Console Advancement Sounds's assets

![elongated dutch flag (unofficial mascot)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/957cd11c89a91361fb97aa38dcc944d882a0f86f.png)
